message.content:
@startuml
participant TaskControl as TaskControl
participant Reins_Agent as Reins_Agent
participant ExecCommands as ExecCommands
participant HostRegistry as HostRegistry

loop all_clients
    TaskControl -> Reins_Agent : identified_key
    Reins_Agent -> ExecCommands : connection check
    ExecCommands -> Reins_Agent : varid?(identified_key)
    Reins_Agent -> TaskControl : status
    TaskControl -> Reins_Agent : status
    Reins_Agent -> HostRegistry : logging status
    HostRegistry -> Reins_Agent : set_status(identified_key, IPaddress, status)
    Reins_Agent -> HostRegistry : store()
    HostRegistry -> TaskControl : true or false
@enduml
